headline: Mastercard Simplifies Cross-Border Payments for Asia Pacific SMEs
summary: Small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) across Asia Pacific are moving faster into global trade, but the complexity and limited visibility in corresponding payments processes continue to slow growth. Mastercard today announced that it is introducing MastercardGlobal Commerce Suite for Small Businesses, a set of holistic capabilities powered by Mastercard Move, designed to help banks support the evolving, cross-border needs of time-strapped SMEs. It is available to banks and financial instituti
